channel.title: BAND-MAID Social Mentions
channel.description: BAND-MAID mentions from across social media.

item.title: [BlueSky] Oh shit it's finally happening
item.dc:creator: Steve Stevers (stevesteverers.whaleoilcandles.com)
item.description:
Oh shit it's finally happening

BlueSky · stevesteverers.whaleoilcandles.com

item.title: [BlueSky] — The plentiful ideas on the chorus and the ability to adapt on the scene, go...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
— The plentiful ideas on the chorus and the ability to adapt on the scene, good indeed. Lets continue on talking about the other song "Choose me".

Kanami: The theme of this song was Band-Maid ish. The characteristics of Band-Maid is rocking hard but easy to listen to, so I focused on these points.

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Song: Choose me
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
Song: Choose me
Album: Daydreaming / Choose me
Release: 7/18/2017
Music: BAND-MAID
Lyrics: 小鳩ミク [Kobato, Miku]
Arrangement: BAND-MAID
1st Live:6/30/2017
#bandmaid

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] My previous favourite song to introduce people to Band-Maid was the live vers...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
My previous favourite song to introduce people to Band-Maid was the live version of Domination, but more recently I've updated that to the live version of Shambles, because they are just so good live. www.youtube.com/watch?v=RmFY...

BlueSky · rockyuphill.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] With you on Cage in particular. Tbh, there are very few Band Maid songs I don...
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
With you on Cage in particular. Tbh, there are very few Band Maid songs I don't like. Bubble is a favourite though, so underrated, imo.

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Been following along with someone's chronological ranking of Band Maid's song...
item.dc:creator: Sam Inglis (24fpsuk.bsky.social)
item.description:
Been following along with someone's chronological ranking of Band Maid's songs (and doing my own list) on a Discord I'm on. Just caught up to him on this track, which I'd have among their Top 10. It's a B Side. Really.

BlueSky · 24fpsuk.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] T-SQUARE
item.dc:creator: 魚弱 (184iwashi184.bsky.social)
item.description:
T-SQUARE
スターダスト・レビュー
THE BACK HORN
POLYSICS
The Birthday
amazarashi
BAND-MAID
Gacharic Spin
SUPER BEAVER
BURNOUT SYNDROMES
デラックス×デラックス
Kalafina
MAN WITH A MISSION
八十八ヶ所巡礼
音羽

ワンマンに限定すると限られるわね。
#単独ライブに行ったことあるアーティストを晒せ

BlueSky · 184iwashi184.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] This always satisfies, better than an Oh Henry bar. Band-Maid "Just Bring It"...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
This always satisfies, better than an Oh Henry bar. Band-Maid "Just Bring It". It shows off the range of the band and their compositional and musicians ship skills. Every song a smile.

BlueSky · rockyuphill.bsky.social

item.title: [Mastodon] https://www.wacoca.com/media/714062/ “おぼろっく2026 ～TSURUGA MUSIC FESTIVAL～”、最終出...
item.dc:creator: Media Japan (media@wakoka.com)
item.description:
https://www.wacoca.com/media/714062/ “おぼろっく2026 ～TSURUGA MUSIC FESTIVAL～”、最終出演アーティストでBAND-MAID、NOISEMAKER、四星球、キュウソネコカミ等14組発表！日割り公開！ | 激ロック ニュース https://wakoka.com/tags/BANDMAID https://wakoka.com/tags/music https://wakoka.com/tags/NOISEMAKER https://wakoka.com/tags/%E3%81%8A%E3%81%BC%E3%82%8D%E3%81%A3%E3%81%8F https://wakoka.com/tags/%E3%81%97%E3%81%9B%E3%81%84%E3%81%8D%E3%82%85%E3%81%86 https://wakoka.com/tags/%E3%81%99%E3%83%BC%E3%81%97%E3%82%93%E3%81%A1%E3%82%85%E3%81%86 https://wakoka.com/tags/%E3%83%8E%E3%82%A4%E3%82%BA%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%82%AB%E3%83%BC https://wakoka.com/tags/%E3%83%90%E3%83%B3%E3%83%89%E3%83%BB%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%89 https://wakoka.com/tags/%E3%83%8F%E3%83%B3%E3%83%89%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%89 https://wakoka.com/tags/%E5%9B%9B%E6%98%9F%E7%90%83 https://wakoka.com/tags/%E9%9F%B3%E6%A5%BD

Mastodon · media@wakoka.com

item.title: [BlueSky] 【LINDBERGや打首獄門同好会も出演】
item.dc:creator: 音楽ナタリー (music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【LINDBERGや打首獄門同好会も出演】
福井県敦賀市フェス「おぼろっく」最終出演者

KANA-BOON、BAND-MAID
NEK!、Maki、wacciら14組追加
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681273?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#おぼろっく

BlueSky · music.natalie.mu

item.title: [BlueSky] BARKS【インタビュー】7年ぶりヨーロッパツアーを経て「我らBAND-MAID、これまで以上にカッコ良くなっている」
item.dc:creator: 佐藤英男 (sato-hideo.bsky.social)
item.description:
BARKS【インタビュー】7年ぶりヨーロッパツアーを経て「我らBAND-MAID、これまで以上にカッコ良くなっている」
barks.jp/news/1078232/
“欧州での日々についても、彼女たちの記憶が鮮明なうちに訊いておきたい。とはいえ会話は、このバンドの仲の良さを無言のうちに伝えるかのような「ENERGETIC」のミュージックビデオのことから始まったのだった。”
取材・文◎増田勇一
撮影◎尾藤能暢
#BARKS #BANDMAID

BlueSky · sato-hideo.bsky.social

#musicchallenge
#blueskymusicchallenge

item.title: [BlueSky] MUCC -縁 [en]-" album (Disc 1 - Track #2) released on 11/22/2017. Included as ...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
MUCC -縁 [en]-" album (Disc 1 - Track #2) released on 11/22/2017. Included as a bonus track on the WORLD DOMINATION album. Played live once on 12/20/2017 at Rensa in Sendai when Band-Maid, Roach, and Hysteric Panic opened for MUCC. MUCC also later played the song and Saiki joined them on stage. (The

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 【インタビュー】7年ぶりヨーロッパツアーを経て「我らBAND-MAID、これまで以上にカッコ良くなっている」 | BARKS

item.description:

item.title: [BlueSky] Ten acts you’ve seen, female lead singer edition:
item.dc:creator: Paul Baldowski 🔜 Tabletop Scotland (Sept. 4–6) (paulbaldowski.bsky.social)
item.description:
Ten acts you’ve seen, female lead singer edition:

Tori Amos
Regina Spektor
Marian Call
Cyndi Lauper

Um... I haven't seen many live bands. If I could see a few more, I'd add:

Band Maid
Sleeper
The Cardigans
Geike Arnaert
Skunk Anansie
The Audience/Sophie Ellis-Bextor

#LiveMusic

BlueSky · paulbaldowski.bsky.social

Now streaming on ballsack.tv
#music #ballsacktv #ballsackradio

BlueSky · feed.ballsack.tv

item.title: [BlueSky] Whilst in Osaka seeing Band-Maid a few years ago I decided to pop into the Ze...
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
Whilst in Osaka seeing Band-Maid a few years ago I decided to pop into the Zemaitis showroom to see the Miku Kobato guitar display.

The nice people there took time to talk to me and demanded I play one of their instruments.

So I did... Badly 🤣

I liked it so much I bought one for myself.

BlueSky · roboto-chan.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Reproduciendo ahora en J-POP FM 93.1: Shambles de BAND-MAID! Sintonice ahora:...
item.dc:creator: J-POP FM 93.1 (jpopfm931pn.bsky.social)
item.description:

BlueSky · jpopfm931pn.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] A few years ago I popped over to Sakai in Osaka for a Band-Maid show.
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
A few years ago I popped over to Sakai in Osaka for a Band-Maid show.

I was travelling alone so took time to investigate some small, back street coffee shops.

This one, called Akari Coffee, was awesome.

The owner was very cool, took time to listen to my rubbish Japanese and had a chat with me.

BlueSky · roboto-chan.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Today is the birthday of everybody's favorite enthusiast of indie music, film...
item.dc:creator: Kara Buchanan 🏳️‍⚧️ (magicariot.com)
item.description:
Today is the birthday of everybody's favorite enthusiast of indie music, film photography, and mega hyper turbo gay-ass lesbianism from the "Magica Riot" series, Hazel Hoffman! You can be sure that Claire and Bloom will be participating in quite the birthday celebration with her today!

BlueSky · magicariot.com

item.title: [BlueSky] BAND-MAIDには思い当たるフシがあるな、、、
item.dc:creator: Sue Cat Boy (suecatboy.bsky.social)
item.description:
BAND-MAIDには思い当たるフシがあるな、、、

ベスト盤もそうだったけど
その後に出たアルバムの通常盤CD、
それなりに結構な値段するのに
歌詞ブックレットの出来があまりにもショボくてスゲエ損した気分ってか、得が無いなとシラケてしまったのがデカいな
しっかり値段相応に作ってくんね〜かな〜、、そう、シラケたんだよ

BlueSky · suecatboy.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 好きだった(まだファンではあるけど)
item.dc:creator: Sue Cat Boy (suecatboy.bsky.social)
item.description:
好きだった(まだファンではあるけど)

BAND-MAID
LOVEBITES

が何故だか最近になって聴けなくなった

BlueSky · suecatboy.bsky.social
